title: What Lies in the Woods
author: Kate Alice Marshall
prompt:
Question: Which of the following passages is verbatim from the "What Lies in the Woods" book by Kate Alice Marshall?
Options:
A. Ethan noted that he had still broken into my room. If he wasn't after me, what was his goal? All he got was my phone, as far as I know. And there's nothing incriminating on that, I said. Being friends with Liv meant acquiring some of her paranoia. Sensitive information did not belong online. Was there anything else they could have taken? he asked. I checked all my equipment. It's still here, I said. Unless... I hobbled over to my roller bag and unzipped it. My cameras were there but I opened one and as expected, the data card was gone.
B. Ethan remarked that the intruder had still broken into my room. If he wasn't after me, what was his objective? All he obtained was my phone, as far as I know. And there's nothing incriminating on that, I said. Being companions with Liv meant acquiring some of her suspicion. I didn't store sensitive material online. Was there anything else they could have taken? he asked. I checked all my equipment. It's still present, I stated. However... I limped over to my roller bag and unzipped it. My cameras were there however I opened one and as anticipated, the data card was gone.
C. He still broke into your room, Ethan pointed out. If he wasnt after you, what was he after? All he got was my phone, as far as I know. And theres nothing incriminating on that, I said. You couldnt be friends with Liv and not have a little of her paranoia rub off on you. Sensitive stuff did not belong on the cloud. Is there anything else they could have taken? he asked. I checked all my gear. Its still here, I said. Unless. I walked painfully over to my roller bag and unzipped it. My cameras were therebut I popped one open and sure enough, the data card was gone.
D. Ethan pointed out that he had still broken into my room. If he wasn't after me, what did he want? All he got was my phone, as far as I know. And there's nothing incriminating on that, I told him. You couldn't be friends with Liv and not get a little of her paranoia. I didn't keep sensitive stuff in the cloud. Was there anything else they could have taken? he asked. I inspected all my gear. It's still here, I said. But just in case... I walked over with difficulty to my roller bag and unzipped it. My cameras were there but I opened one and sure enough, the data card was missing.  
Answer:

Being friends with Liv meant acquiring some of her paranoia. Sensitive information did not belong online. Was there anything else they could have taken? he asked. I checked all my equipment. It's still here, I said. Unless... I hobbled over to my roller bag and unzipped it. My cameras were there but I opened one and as expected, the data card was gone.
options.B: Ethan remarked that the intruder had still broken into my room. If he wasn't after me, what was his objective? All he obtained was my phone, as far as I know. Was there anything else they could have taken? he asked. I checked all my equipment. It's still present, I stated. However... I limped over to my roller bag and unzipped it. My cameras were there however I opened one and as anticipated, the data card was gone.

options.D: Ethan pointed out that he had still broken into my room. If he wasn't after me, what did he want? All he got was my phone, as far as I know. And there's nothing incriminating on that, I told him. You couldn't be friends with Liv and not get a little of her paranoia. I didn't keep sensitive stuff in the cloud.
